prompt: Two references are attached: a PHOTO of the actual dish, and a vintage voucher whose food illustration shows the ENGRAVING STYLE to use. Draw the dish from the photo as a hand-tinted chromolithograph in that engraving style: wide hand-torn curry-gold ribbon noodles lifted high with wooden chopsticks above a bowl, ribbons irregular and glossy with turmeric-gold sauce, flecks of green bell pepper and cilantro, scraps of seasoned meat, gentle steam. Hand-tinted color washes over warm ochre engraved linework: rich curry gold on the ribbons, fresh green on peppers and cilantro, warm brown on meat. Centered on a plain flat harvest gold (#E0AC45) background with NOTHING else - no border, no frame, no text, no bowl-table scene, no hands. Do not copy any layout, border, or text from the voucher reference. Subject fills about 70% of the frame. Bright and vivid, no darkening, no aging wash, no shadows. Flat traditional print illustration, no photorealism.
